title: Dance of the Dragons: Dragons Killing Dragons #got #shorts
description: The Dance of the Dragons reached its peak when dragons began killing each other. This was the moment the Targaryens lost control of everything. #ASOIAF #Dragons #Shorts

scenes.narration: Dragons were meant to conquer kingdoms—but now, they were turning on each other.
scenes.image_prompt: two massive dragons facing off in stormy sky, tension and lightning, dark fantasy cinematic, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: As the war escalated, dragonriders were forced to face their own kin in battle.
scenes.image_prompt: dragonriders preparing to fight each other in sky, emotional tension, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: For the first time, dragons fought not armies—but other dragons.
scenes.image_prompt: dragons colliding mid-air with fire and claws, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The skies burned as fire met fire, and the ground below was caught in the destruction.
scenes.image_prompt: sky filled with dragonfire raining onto battlefield below, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Each clash was devastating, with both sides losing power they could never replace.
scenes.image_prompt: injured dragons falling from sky amid chaos, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The bond between rider and dragon became a weapon—and a weakness.
scenes.image_prompt: dragon reacting emotionally as rider is attacked, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Even victories came at a cost too great, leaving both sides weaker after every battle.
scenes.image_prompt: burning battlefield with fallen dragons and survivors, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: What was once the greatest strength of the Targaryens became the reason for their downfall.
scenes.image_prompt: dragon skulls and ruins symbolizing decline, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: By the end, fewer dragons remained—and the world was forever changed.
scenes.image_prompt: empty sky where dragons once flew, haunting atmosphere, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Because when dragons kill dragons, no one truly wins—only the end draws closer.
scenes.image_prompt: final dragon silhouette fading into dark sky, cinematic tragic ending, vertical 1080x1920
